description: Brand Industrial Services, Inc., known as BrandSafway, is an American company that provides industrial, commercial, and infrastructure sector services, including scaffolding systems, shoring, fireproofing, and forming and shoring solutions. The company also offers industrial services, maintenance and refurbishment support, and new construction and expansion solutions. BrandSafway operates a global network with locations in 25 countries and serves industries such as oil and gas, power generation, civil and infrastructure, and commercial construction. The company utilizes digital planning and management platforms, a supply chain and logistics network, and maintains an EHS management system to support its operations.
core_offerings: 3D Integrated Design and Virtual Planning Services
Power Protection Platform Supply and Installation
Suspended Access System Supply and Installation

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: Fluor Corporation is an American engineering, procurement, and construction company that provides engineering, procurement, construction, maintenance, and project management services. The company operates in sectors such as energy, infrastructure, chemicals, government, life sciences, manufacturing, mining and metals, and technology. Fluor also offers architecture and planning, civil engineering, design, and technical services, as well as environmental services, logistics and supply chain management, and program management. The company serves clients in over 60 locations worldwide and is certified for its operations.

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: Kiewit Corporation is an American construction and engineering company that provides engineering, construction, procurement, and development services for sectors including transportation, water and wastewater, power, oil, gas, chemical, building, industrial, marine, and mining. The company also offers building information modeling, construction management, and self-performed project scopes. Kiewit operates through a network of subsidiaries and offices in the United States, Canada, Mexico, and Alaska, and is involved in infrastructure development and sustainability initiatives.
core_offerings: Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Project Delivery

description: Clayton Homes, Inc. is an American construction company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and construction of single-family homes, including manufactured, modular, and site-built options. The company also provides home insurance, financing, and energy-efficient and zero energy ready home solutions. Clayton Homes operates through multiple business units, including technology, home building, retail, logistics, mortgage and finance, insurance, and construction services. The company is a registered trademark of the Manufactured Housing Institute and is part of the Berkshire Hathaway group.

Brock Services, LLC, known as Brock Group, is an American company engaged in providing multi-craft specialty services for industrial and commercial sectors. The company offers services such as scaffold material rental, shop facilities, field services, project management, construction, maintenance, turnaround projects, and specialized services including scaffolding, insulation, painting, abatement, fireproofing, shoring, facilities maintenance, fabrication, general mechanical services, technical services, and safety services. Brock Group serves a wide range of industries, including oil and gas, petrochemical, power generation, LNG, offshore, heavy manufacturing, food processing, pipelines and transmission, nuclear, pulp and paper, and pharmaceuticals, with operations across the United States and Canada.

primary_naics.label: Power and Communication Line and Related Structures Construction

description: Quanta Services, Inc. is an American corporation that provides infrastructure contracting and engineering services for the electric power, renewable energy, communications, pipeline, and industrial sectors. The company delivers integrated solutions in planning, design, installation, maintenance, and repair of energy and communications infrastructure, including transmission and distribution lines, substations, and utility systems. Its operations also encompass engineering, procurement, construction (EPC) services, program management, emergency restoration, and environmental pipeline and industrial project management. Quanta Services serves clients in the United States, Canada, Australia, and select international markets, and is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange.
core_offerings: Heavy Lift and Aerial Work Services
Fiber Optic Network Installation and Maintenance
Carbon Capture and Biofuel Plant Construction

description: BNBuilders, Inc., DBA BNBuilders, is an American construction company specialized in commercial building solutions for sectors including life sciences, education, healthcare, public, corporate, technology, hospitality, and residential. The company provides services such as preconstruction, alternative delivery methods, Lean construction, Virtual Design & Construction (VDC), sustainable construction practices, vendor diversity, and self-perform work. BNBuilders serves clients across the Pacific Northwest, California, Colorado, and beyond, and is a member of industry associations such as DBIA, LEED AP, and ISPE.

primary_naics.label: Electrical Contractors and Other Wiring Installation Contractors

description: EMCOR Group, Inc. is an American company that operates in mechanical and electrical construction, industrial and energy infrastructure, and facilities management. The company provides services such as building services, HVAC systems, life safety and fire protection, and security solutions. EMCOR Group also supplies solar energy equipment and is involved in the planning, installation, operation, and maintenance of facility systems, including electrical, mechanical, lighting, air conditioning, heating, and power generation. The company serves a diverse client base, including businesses, organizations, hospitals, education facilities, and government sectors, and operates in both the United States and the United Kingdom.
core_offerings: Facility Security System Installation and Maintenance
Life Safety System Installation and Maintenance
Fire Protection System Installation and Maintenance

description: Skanska AB is a Swedish construction and development company engaged in project development, construction, and development services for residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. The company operates primarily in the United States and serves a diverse range of clients across various sectors. Skanska also functions as an energy engineering and contractor, and is involved in civil engineering activities. Its operations are supported by a global supply chain and logistics network.

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: Versar, Inc., DBA Versar, is an American company specialized in infrastructure projects, security, engineering, construction, and ecological solutions. The company serves governments, military contracts, intelligence communities, and commercial clients, with a focus on ecological solutions aimed at reducing global environmental impact. Versar operates worldwide, providing services such as installation management, support services, coastal resilience, information technology, integrated security, planning and assessment, systems integration, installation, and sustainment. The company is also involved in small business partner programs and is part of the Louis Berger Services (LBS) team, which provides operation and maintenance services at large military installations and transportation facilities.

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: Bechtel Corporation is an American engineering, procurement, construction, and project management company. The company provides services in energy engineering, nuclear technology, defense, and environmental markets, serving sectors such as energy, infrastructure, manufacturing, mining, and national security. Bechtel also operates as a contractor and offers specialized centers of excellence for welding, applied technology, and LNG technology. Its operations are supported by a global supply chain and a network of offices and subsidiaries in multiple regions.
core_offerings: Defense and National Security Infrastructure Services

description: F-C Construction LLC, DBA Focus Civil Construction Group, is a United States construction management, design-build, and general contracting company specialized in commercial, industrial, and residential construction projects. The company provides project management, construction consulting, architecture, building, tiling, painting, interior design, and renovation services, serving a global clientele across various industries. It also operates as a provider of sustainability and supply chain management solutions, utilizing technologies such as trade credit policy and procedures.

Tutor Perini Corporation is an American construction company engaged in civil, building, and specialty construction services. The company provides general contracting, project management, engineering, equipment manufacturing, federal prime contracting, green building, remote construction, self-performed services, surety services, and virtual design and construction. Tutor Perini serves a wide range of markets, including aviation, infrastructure, commercial, education, government and military, healthcare, hospitality and gaming, justice, manufacturing and industrial, mixed-use and retail, public assembly and entertainment, rail and mass transit, recovery and restoration, residential, science and technology, sports, tunnels and mines, and water. The company is a member of the National Association of Construction Managers (NACM) and the American Institute of Constructors (AIC).

PulteGroup, Inc. is an American homebuilding company engaged in the construction and sale of residential properties. The company operates under multiple brands and serves a range of homebuyers, including first-time, move-up, and active-adult buyers, across over 45 markets in the United States. PulteGroup also manages a supply chain and logistics network to support its homebuilding operations. The company is publicly traded and has received certifications for workplace culture and sustainability.

DPR Construction, Inc. is an American general contractor and construction management company engaged in technically complex and sustainable construction projects. The company serves markets including technology, healthcare, higher education, life sciences, commercial, hospitality, manufacturing, and office sectors, with a global presence in the United States, South America, Europe, and Asia. DPR Construction also operates as a provider of construction management, building information modeling, and integrated project delivery services, and is involved in the design and construction of mission critical and data center projects.

description: City Exchange (صرافی شهر) is a British financial service provider specialized in foreign exchange and remittance services, with a focus on currency exchange and money transfer between Iran and the UK. The company operates as a financial service provider with over 12 branches across the UK, including London and Birmingham, and serves both individual and business clients. City Exchange also offers online consultations and currency price updates, and its services are available in English and Persian.

FGC Money Transfer serves individuals and businesses through airports, hotels, tourist cities, and street offices, and partners with banks and financial institutions to offer international money transfer solutions.

It is approved by the Monetary Authority of the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) and the HM Income and Clients Authority (MLR) to conduct cash move exercises.

description: CTC FUND LIMITED, DBA CTC FUND, is a British financial services company specialized in decentralized finance, operating on blockchain networks. The company facilitates interest generation on assets held in Interest Accounts by lending them to institutional and corporate borrowers, utilizing an over-collateralized loan model. It also provides automated risk management and maintains secure reserves with a regulated trust company. CTC FUND serves a global client base.

description: Phin is a German private company operating in the financial services sector, specializing in business solutions and services. The company provides a mobile banking platform that integrates multiple bank accounts, neobanks, and wallets from over 3,400 institutions across 18 European countries. Phin also offers a feature that automatically calculates and offsets CO2 emissions associated with transaction history, supporting certified carbon offset projects that address environmental, social, and economic development initiatives in developing countries.

description: Sandiup Global S.L., DBA Credito21, is a Spanish company specialized in providing online credit comparison services and financial advisory. The company offers a platform for users to compare credit products from over 50 financial institutions and banks, including those with ASNEF listings, to facilitate access to personal loans, credit cards, and other credit solutions. Credito21 serves individual users seeking to compare and select credit offers.

primary_naics.label: International, Secondary Market, and All Other Nondepository Credit Intermediation

description: Euro-Rijn Financial Services B.V. is a Dutch financial services company engaged in commodity trade finance. The company provides trade financing solutions for clients in the commodity trading sector, enabling access to working capital by financing goods stored in the warehouses of Euro-Rijn Group companies. Its services include individual credit limits and repurchase agreements with commodities as collateral, with a focus on metals, industrial goods, ferro alloys, non-ferro metals, energy, and soft commodities. Euro-Rijn Financial Services serves clients globally, particularly in the commodity trading industry.
core_offerings: Metals and Industrial Goods Financing Services
Ferro Alloys and Non-Ferro Metals Financing Services

description: Ensemble Labs Inc, DBA TrueFoundry, is a United States technology company specialized in machine learning platform automation and infrastructure as code solutions. The company provides tools and platforms for streamlining machine learning workflows, enabling data scientists and ML engineers to deploy models efficiently. TrueFoundry's platform automates parts of the ML pipeline, including model training, deployment, monitoring, and sharing, and integrates with CI/CD pipelines and various deployment models such as serverless and cron jobs. The company serves organizations seeking to accelerate and scale their machine learning operations.

primary_naics.label: Computing Infrastructure Providers, Data Processing, Web Hosting, and Related Services

description: trainML, LLC, DBA trainML, is an American limited liability company specialized in providing a serverless GPU-based deep learning infrastructure for machine learning model training and hyperparameter tuning. The company offers a platform that enables users to launch notebooks, run training jobs, and deploy REST API endpoints for inference, supporting a variety of GPU types. trainML serves machine learning developers globally and provides features such as persistent datasets, models, and project management.
core_offerings: Project Management and Access Control Services

description: ZoKorp is a United States company specialized in AI/ML and data analytics, with a focus on consulting and integration services for businesses and individuals. The company provides AWS consultation, APN consultation, and offers AWS ML products, including containerized ETL solutions and data analytics workflow tools. ZoKorp also operates as a provider of cloud computing and machine learning solutions, supporting businesses in designing, deploying, and optimizing AI/ML and data analytics initiatives.

Ripley Decision Advantage is a consulting firm engaged in AI/ML tools and workflow optimization for businesses and public sector organizations. The company provides services such as bespoke AI/ML model development, model explainability, performance, scalability, model development and training, and ML Ops. Ripley Decision Advantage also offers assessments of existing vendors and is involved in the development of pre-sales for AI and ML tools, data products, voice-enabled agentic AI, and digital twin solutions. The firm serves clients globally and is headquartered in Silicon Valley, California.
core_offerings: AI and ML Workflow Optimization Consulting
Pre-Sales AI and ML Advisory Services
Vendor Assessment Services for AI and ML Solutions
Bespoke AI and ML Model Development

description: TensorFlow JVM Special Interest Group is a computer software entity operating within the information technology and services sector, focused on enabling machine learning capabilities by supporting TensorFlow on any Java Virtual Machine (JVM) for building, training, and running models. The group provides utilities and frameworks to assist data scientists and developers in common machine learning tasks, supporting compatibility with Java and other JVM languages such as Scala and Kotlin for use in enterprises worldwide.

primary_naics.label: Research and Development in the Physical, Engineering, and Life Sciences (except Nanotechnology and Biotechnology)

description: Stanford DAWN is a research project focused on democratizing machine learning by developing tools and technologies that enable non-expert users to build production-quality data products. The project addresses challenges in data management, feature selection, model training, productionization, and monitoring in the ML production pipeline, and collaborates with faculty, students, and industry partners to advance ML solutions. It operates globally, with a primary focus on making ML accessible to a broader audience.

Chen Qian is a machine learning engineer and computer scientist specializing in deep learning, large language models, and machine learning operations. He is a co-founder of KerasNLP, a natural language processing library, and is involved in the development of MLflow and DSPy, contributing to open-source machine learning platforms and frameworks. Chen Qian is also active in the areas of ML data processing, model authoring, training, optimization, and deployment, and is involved in backend and infrastructure engineering, building scalable web services. He is available to give tech talks and workshops on deep learning, focusing on training, finetuning, and MLOps with MLflow.

HighsideAI is a United States company engaged in providing AI and machine learning services for the US Government and Department of Defense. The company offers privately hosted AI applications, secure large language model inferencing, and AI/ML training environments, as well as integration with existing tools such as SharePoint, Confluence, and Mattermost. HighsideAI also provides training programs for administrators and end users, enabling organizations to deploy secure AI solutions in classified environments and field operations.
core_offerings: AI and ML End User Training Services
AI and ML Platform Integration Services
AI and ML Administrator Training Services
Secure Large Language Model Inferencing Services

description: Cascadia Pacific LLC is an American consulting and research firm engaged in artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. The company provides services such as AI infrastructure assessments, ML model development, data-driven insights, and deployment solutions, as well as risk management and board advisory for AI integration. Cascadia Pacific also offers consulting in LLM model selection, deep learning development, and the integration of LLM models with existing systems. Its clients include organizations in healthcare, hospitality, and aerospace.
core_offerings: AI and ML Model Deployment Solutions
AI Risk Management and Board Advisory
LLM Case Study and Advisory Services

description: Dylan Zeigler is a United States software developer engaged in full-stack development and data engineering, with a focus on AI and machine learning use cases. He has experience in building, scaling, and deploying software products and teams, covering areas such as assembly, FPGAs, web development, and data ETLs. Dylan Zeigler also operates as a Machine Learning Engineer at Lighty AI, contributing to AI/ML projects.

description: Vestas Wind Systems A/S is a Danish manufacturing company engaged in the design, production, installation, and servicing of wind turbines. The company also provides development and digital services, including drone inspections and fleet optimization, and offers environmental services related to renewable energy. Vestas operates internationally, with manufacturing facilities and offices in multiple countries, and is involved in sustainability initiatives such as blade circularity, low-emission steel, and zero-waste wind turbines.
core_offerings: Blade Recycling and Circular Economy Solutions

primary_naics.label: Other Electronic Parts and Equipment Merchant Wholesalers

description: International Wind Energy ApS, DBA International Wind Energy, is a Danish company specialized in the promotion and investment in green energy, renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing, wind turbines, hardware, and alternative pension savings. The company serves Danish investors and has also marketed German wind turbines and solar panels in Sweden, England, and the United States. It operates through its subsidiary, IWE Administration ApS, which manages a portfolio of German solar installations.

Galileo Empower Finland Oy, DBA Galileo Empower Finland, is a Finnish company specialized in wind power development, including wind turbine manufacturing, installation, commissioning, and storage. The company primarily operates in Finland, focusing on the project development, construction, and operation of wind farms. It also maintains a global presence, serving stakeholders such as landowners, municipalities, and local communities.

Walmart Stores, Inc. is an American retail corporation engaged in the operation of hypermarkets, discount department stores, grocery stores, and online retail platforms. The company offers a broad range of consumer goods, including groceries, home goods, electronics, health and wellness products, automotive supplies, pet supplies, and school and office supplies. Walmart also provides business retail services, such as Walmart Business, and operates Sam's Club retail warehouses. The company is involved in logistics, transportation, and information technology, and is certified for sustainability initiatives.

The Home Depot, Inc. is an American multinational home improvement retail corporation engaged in the sale of home improvement products and services. The company operates a network of big-box stores and e-commerce platforms, offering a broad range of products such as appliances, building materials, home décor, and tools, as well as providing home services including flooring installation, bathroom remodeling, and smart home installations. The Home Depot also operates as a contractor supply provider and maintains a distribution network through Interline Brands, serving customers in the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

US Foods, Inc. is an American food distribution company that supplies food products, culinary equipment, and digital tools to restaurants, healthcare facilities, hospitality establishments, educational institutions, and other foodservice operators. The company operates production facilities and butchery operations, and provides menu development, distribution logistics, imports, specialty foods, menu cost optimization, and food safety services. US Foods also offers e-commerce and business solutions, including digital platforms and business tools, and is involved in exclusive brand development and responsible sourcing.

F21 IPCO, LLC, known as Forever 21, is an American retail company engaged in fast-fashion apparel and accessories for women, men, plus-size, and children. The company operates a direct-to-consumer business model, offering a broad range of fashion products, including clothing, shoes, accessories, and beauty items, through both physical outlets and an online platform. Forever 21 serves a diverse customer base and is part of the apparel industry.

nothing,nowhere is an American music company specializing in the creation, distribution, and sale of music content, including albums, music videos, and live performances. The company also operates as a retailer of tour merchandise and provides direct-to-consumer distribution of music-related products. In addition to its core music industry activities, nothing,nowhere is involved in live performances and tours, and collaborates with music labels to support its artists.

Gillette Company LLC is an American company engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of men's grooming products, including razors, blades, beard trimmers, and intimate shaving products. The company also operates a subscription-based service for product delivery and offers personalized razor handles. Gillette serves both individual consumers and businesses in multiple countries, with a focus on sustainability through the use of eco-friendly materials and waste reduction initiatives.

primary_naics.label: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

description: Hy-Vee, Inc. is an American retail company that operates a chain of supermarkets and convenience stores. The company offers grocery shopping, online ordering, and delivery services, and provides additional retail functions such as bakeries, delicatessens, florist departments, pharmacies, wine and spirits, health clinics, fitness centers, and full-service restaurants. Hy-Vee also manages fuel stations with convenience stores, car washes, and offers food service options including salad bars and drive-in theatres. The company serves individual customers and businesses across multiple states in the Midwest and Southern United States.
core_offerings: Fitness Center and Drive-In Theatre Retail
Car Wash and Convenience Store Retail

description: Avery Products Corporation is an American manufacturing company engaged in the production and supply of self-adhesive labels, labeling software, binders, dividers, and other office supplies. The company serves businesses, individual consumers, and educational institutions, offering products such as blank and custom labels, cards, tags, and related organizational items. Avery also provides digital design tools and templates for its products. The company operates internationally and is part of CCL Industries Inc.

AriZona Beverages USA, LLC., known as DrinkAriZona, is an American beverage company engaged in the production and distribution of iced tea, juice cocktails, fruit snacks, energy drinks, and related merchandise. The company operates both as a beverage manufacturer and distributor, serving convenience store shoppers, individual consumers, and families in the United States and internationally through its European subsidiary. DrinkAriZona also offers subscription services and an online store for its product range.

Coop Home Goods, LLC, known as Coop Sleep Goods, is an American company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and retail of adjustable and memory foam sleep products, including pillows, sheets, comforters, mattress toppers, and bedding accessories. The company also operates as a bedding and home goods store, serving individuals, families, and healthcare providers. Coop Sleep Goods incorporates eco-friendly materials and cooling technologies in its products and maintains an e-commerce platform.
core_offerings: Sleep Product Promotions and Newsletter Services

description: TRU Kids, Inc., DBA Toys"R"Us, is an American retail company specialized in toys, dolls, action figures, learning games, building blocks, and related children's products. The company serves a global market, focusing on children and families, and operates both physical stores and an online platform. Toys"R"Us also provides DIY activities, toy reviews, and printable content to engage customers.
core_offerings: Toy Review and Product Evaluation Services
DIY Activities and Educational Content Services

description: Harbor Freight is an American retailer engaged in tools and equipment, operating a chain of retail stores and an e-commerce platform. The company offers a broad range of products including automotive, air and power tools, storage, outdoor power equipment, generators, welding supplies, shop equipment, and hand tools. Harbor Freight also provides extended service protection plans, replacement parts, and a credit card program, and is involved in community initiatives supporting schools and trades programs.
core_offerings: Tool and Equipment Quality Assurance Services

description: Lululemon Athletica Inc. is a Canadian multinational company engaged in the retail of technical apparel, athletic shoes, loungewear, and related lifestyle products. The company operates both physical stores and an online platform, serving a global market with a focus on performance apparel and footwear. Lululemon also offers accessories and personal care products, and is committed to sustainability and ethical practices.

primary_naics.label: All Other Converted Paper Product Manufacturing

description: BBK Tobacco & Foods, LLP, known as RAW Rolling Papers, is an American manufacturing and distribution company engaged in plant-based rolling papers and related products for smoking cannabis and tobacco. The company also produces filters and hand-rolling machines, and is involved in medical marijuana initiatives and educational programs. RAW Rolling Papers serves both individual smokers and retailers, with operations primarily in the United States.

Goya Foods, Inc. is an American food company engaged in the production and distribution of Hispanic and Latin American foods and beverages. The company operates manufacturing and distribution facilities in the United States, Puerto Rico, the Dominican Republic, and Spain, supplying products such as beans, rice, seasonings, snacks, beverages, and frozen ingredients to both Hispanic and mainstream markets. Goya Foods also manages a webstore and distributes its products through national club stores. The company is certified for sustainability and environmental responsibility, including the use of solar energy and the preservation of traditional crops and harvesting practices.

Bodis, LLC is a United States company specialized in the production and distribution of beauty cosmetics and cosmetic packaging. The company primarily serves wholesale clients in the United States, offering products and packaging solutions for both business and individual customers.

Flextribe is a company engaged in eco-friendly honeycomb packing paper and reusable packaging solutions for fragile items such as electronics, home décor, and accessories. The company emphasizes sustainability by using eco-friendly materials and promoting reusable packaging options to reduce the carbon footprint. Flextribe serves a global market, including the cosmetics, photo, and home décor industries, and operates through a direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform.

Concentrix Corporation is an American technology and services company that provides enterprise technology solutions, business process outsourcing, and business transformation services. The company delivers strategy and design, data and analytics, enterprise technology, digital operations, and specialized offerings such as contact center solutions, AI-powered digital transformation, and cybersecurity services. Concentrix serves clients in sectors including automotive, banking, financial services, energy, government, healthcare, media, retail, technology, and travel, and operates internationally across multiple regions. The company is publicly traded and has a history of strategic acquisitions.

Genpact Luxembourg S.a.r.l is an American information technology services, consulting, and outsourcing company engaged in business process outsourcing and technology solutions. The company provides services in data and AI, digital technology, advisory services, and business functions such as finance and accounting, risk and compliance, supply chain management, customer care, human resources management, sales and commercial, sourcing and procurement, sustainability, and trust and safety. Genpact serves clients in over 35 countries and operates globally, with a presence in the United States and India.
core_offerings: Sustainability and Supply Chain Management Services

description: EPAM Systems, Inc. is an American software engineering company that provides software engineering, digital platform engineering, and digital product design services. The company also offers digital transformation consulting, cloud and data analytics solutions, artificial intelligence and cybersecurity services, and digital business process outsourcing. EPAM serves clients in sectors such as consumer goods, financial services, healthcare, energy, and automotive, and operates internationally with offices in the USA, Europe, Asia, and the Middle East. The company is a member of the MACH Alliance and is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange.

Leidos, Inc. is an American company that operates as a systems integrator, engineering firm, and information technology services provider. The company delivers solutions in national security, health, defense, energy, government, and space sectors, with activities including systems integration, engineering, and IT services. Leidos also provides digital modernization, cybersecurity, and enterprise software solutions, as well as cloud and artificial intelligence services. Its operations serve both civilian and defense agencies, as well as commercial markets, and the company holds government-wide acquisition, indefinite delivery, and blanket purchase agreement contract vehicles.
core_offerings: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Services

description: Booz Allen Hamilton Inc. is an American company that provides management and technology consulting, cybersecurity services, digital transformation solutions, and artificial intelligence and cloud computing services. The company also offers software development, mission readiness support, and professional training and coaching. Booz Allen serves government agencies, commercial enterprises, international organizations, and nonprofits, with operations in the United States, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company is publicly traded and is a component of the Russell 1000 index.

Mphasis Corporation is an Indian multinational information technology service and consulting company engaged in technology solutions, cloud services, and digital transformation. The company provides services in application services, blockchain, cognitive computing, cybersecurity, IT value stream acceleration, agile IT operations, experience design, governance, risk and compliance, infrastructure services, modernization, data management, and product engineering. Mphasis serves clients across sectors such as banking, insurance, healthcare, life sciences, oil and gas, public sector, technology, communications, energy and utilities, logistics, and manufacturing, with operations in the Americas, Asia Pacific, Africa, Europe, and Oceania. The company also operates as a business process outsourcing provider and is publicly traded on the Bombay Stock Exchange and the National Stock Exchange of India.

Science Applications International Corporation, Inc., known as SAIC, is an American technology company that provides mission integration, information technology services, engineering, and professional services for federal civilian, state and local, defense, intelligence community, and space sectors. The company delivers solutions in areas such as mission IT, enterprise IT, cybersecurity, cloud services, and artificial intelligence-driven tools. SAIC operates internationally, with offices in the United States, Australia, Canada, and other countries.
core_offerings: Federal and State IT Solutions Development

description: Tietoevry Oyj is a Finnish company engaged in software development, digital engineering, and IT consulting. The company provides services in cloud solutions, data-driven business transformation, intelligent automation, user experience services, cybersecurity, and AI-powered solutions. Tietoevry serves a broad range of industries, including automotive, financial services, healthcare, education, energy, manufacturing, public sector, pulp, paper, and packaging, as well as fintech and telecom sectors. The company operates internationally, with offices in Finland, Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Estonia, France, Germany, India, and the United States.

ASGN Incorporated is an American information technology services company that provides IT consulting, professional staffing, and enterprise software solutions for commercial and government clients. The company operates through two main segments: Apex Systems, which delivers technology and creative digital marketing services, and ECS, which provides mission-critical IT services to government agencies. ASGN also offers management consulting, professional training and coaching, and digital services, including data and analytics, artificial intelligence and machine learning, and cloud solutions. The company serves a broad range of industries, including financial services, healthcare, technology, media, telecommunications, business and government services, and defense, and maintains operations in North America, Mexico, Canada, and Latin America.

CACI International Inc is an American multinational company that provides professional services and information technology solutions for national security, government, and private sector clients. The company operates in consulting, defense, information technology, and outsourcing, offering services such as enterprise IT, mission and engineering support, space and spectrum superiority, cyber and digital solutions, and government property management. CACI also delivers business intelligence and software development, including enterprise and business systems, and supports its operations with a corporate service management system, virtual university, and related tools and platforms. The company is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange and is certified for sustainability and corporate social responsibility.

Hisun New Energy Materials Ltd. Co., DBA Hisun, is a United States company specialized in new energy battery materials, including electrolytes for lithium and sodium ion batteries, silicon carbon anode materials, raw materials, special additives, sodium-ion battery electrolytes, and solid electrolytes. The company serves a range of industries such as digital, power, energy storage, emergency start, unmanned aerial vehicle, model aircraft, electronic cigarette, and electric tool sectors. Hisun also operates as a manufacturer and distributor of materials for new energy applications, and maintains a technology innovation platform to support its research and development activities.
core_offerings: New Energy Battery Materials Research and Development

description: QuantumScape Battery, Inc. is an American electronics manufacturer and technology company engaged in the development and production of solid-state lithium-metal batteries for electric vehicles and energy storage applications. The company specializes in solid ceramic electrolyte separators and anode-less cell designs, and collaborates with automotive partners to support the commercialization of its battery technology. QuantumScape also conducts research and development in materials science and engineering, and is publicly traded on the Nasdaq exchange.
core_offerings: Anode-Less Battery Cell Design and Manufacturing
Advanced Battery Technology Research and Development

address.region_name: Autonomous Community of the Basque Country

description: CIDEcell is a Spanish manufacturer specialized in the production of customized electrodes and cells for lithium-ion batteries, solid-state batteries, sodium-ion batteries, lithium-sulphur batteries, and ultracapacitors. The company serves industries such as aerospace, medical devices, renewable energy, defense, electric vehicles, marine, and related sectors. CIDEcell also operates as a provider of material manufacturing, OEM manufacturing, and battery manufacturing services, and maintains research and development laboratories for materials and characterization. The company emphasizes sustainability through the use of environmentally conscious materials and processes.

primary_naics.label: Other Electronic Parts and Equipment Merchant Wholesalers

description: International Wind Energy ApS, DBA International Wind Energy, is a Danish company specialized in the promotion and investment in green energy, renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing, wind turbines, hardware, and alternative pension savings. The company serves Danish investors and has also marketed German wind turbines and solar panels in Sweden, England, and the United States. It operates through its subsidiary, IWE Administration ApS, which manages a portfolio of German solar installations.

Navitas is a Danish consultancy firm engaged in renewable energy engineering and business consultancy. The company provides advisory services for renewable projects, including feasibility studies, design, procurement, construction, operation and maintenance, contract review, site supervision, commissioning, and technical due diligence. Navitas also engages in renewable energy semiconductor manufacturing and owners engineering, supporting large-scale international projects in areas such as wind energy, photovoltaic systems, geothermal heating and cooling, solar thermal, and solar energy.
